## Aba: Your KPIs

|   |   |   |   |   |   |   |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Business Metrics |  | LTV | = | REV | / | CUST |
|  |  | 50 |  | 1500 |  | 30 |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  | REV | = | SALES | X | AOV |
|  |  | 1500 |  | 30 |  | 50 |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  | ROAS | = | AOV | / | CPA |
| Funnel Metrics |  | 1.5 |  | 50 |  | 33.33333333 |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  | AOV | = | ASP | X | QTY |
|  |  | 50 |  | 40 |  | 1.25 |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  | CPA | = | CPC | / | CVR % |
|  |  | 33.33333333 |  | 1 |  | 0.03 |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  | CVR % | = | SALES | / | VISITS |
| Advertising Metrics |  | 0.03 |  | 30 |  | 1000 |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  | CPC | = | (CPM / 1000) | / | CTR |
|  |  | 1 |  | 20 |  | 0.02 |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  | Spend | = | 1000 |  |  |
